title: hebe cupressoides
intro: Hebe cupressoides, also known as the New Zealand hebe or alpine hebe, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Hebe cupressoides is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
